title: Frontend Developer Job Simulation
description: Experience real-world frontend tasks like building responsive UIs, debugging components, and implementing API integrations.
about: Get a taste of what it means to work as a Frontend Developer at a fast-growing tech startup. You'll work through real tasks similar to those given to junior developers on their first week.

tasks.title: Build a Responsive Navbar
tasks.description: Create a fully responsive navigation bar using HTML and CSS. It must work on mobile, tablet, and desktop. Include a hamburger menu for mobile.

tasks.title: React Component Architecture
tasks.description: Build a reusable card component in React. Accept props for title, description, image, and a CTA button. Style it with CSS modules.

tasks.title: API Integration
tasks.description: Fetch data from a public REST API (JSONPlaceholder) and display a paginated list of users. Handle loading, error, and empty states.

tasks.title: Bug Hunt & Debugging
tasks.description: You are given a broken React app with 5 intentional bugs. Find and fix all bugs. Write a short explanation of what each bug was and how you fixed it.

faq.a: No. This is a self-paced simulation. Complete tasks at your own speed within the time estimates.

faq.q: Do I need to submit code?
faq.a: Tasks are designed for self-assessment. Follow each task guide, complete it, and then proceed to the next.

faq.q: What do I get for INR 99?
faq.a: A verified PDF certificate issued by SkillValix with your name, role, and a QR code to verify authenticity.
The certificate is issued by SkillValix, an MSME-registered ed-tech company. You can share it on LinkedIn.

title: Data Analyst Job Simulation
description: Analyze real datasets, create visualizations, write SQL queries, and present your insights just like a real data analyst.
about: Experience a real data analyst workflow: cleaning messy data, exploring datasets, creating dashboards, and communicating insights.

tasks.title: Data Cleaning with Pandas
tasks.description: You're given a CSV with missing values, duplicates, and inconsistent formatting. Clean the dataset and export a clean version.

tasks.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
tasks.description: Analyze the clean dataset. Find the top 5 insights. Use descriptive statistics and correlation analysis.

tasks.title: Data Visualization
tasks.description: Create 4 meaningful charts using matplotlib/seaborn or Excel: a bar chart, line trend, scatter plot, and heatmap.

tasks.title: Executive Summary
tasks.description: Write a one-page executive summary of your analysis. Highlight key findings, anomalies, and business recommendations.

faq.a: Python 3 with pandas, matplotlib, and seaborn. Or you can use Excel or Google Sheets for the visualization task.
No. This is a guided self-paced experience. There is no automated grader. It's about your learning.

faq.q: What do I get for INR 99?
faq.a: A verified, downloadable PDF certificate issued by SkillValix with your name and role.

title: UI/UX Designer Job Simulation
description: Design user flows, create wireframes, build Figma prototypes and conduct usability analysis for a real product.
about: Step into the shoes of a UX designer at a product startup. You'll go from user research to polished Figma prototypes.

tasks.title: User Research & Personas
tasks.description: Define 2 user personas for a food delivery app. Include goals, pain points, and tech comfort level.

tasks.title: Wireframing
tasks.description: Create low-fidelity wireframes for 4 key screens of the app: Home, Search, Order Detail, and Checkout.

tasks.title: High-Fidelity Prototype
tasks.description: Build a clickable high-fidelity prototype in Figma using a consistent design system (colors, typography, components).

faq.a: Basic Figma knowledge is helpful but not required. The task guides walk you through what to deliver.

faq.q: What do I get for INR 99?
faq.a: A verified PDF certificate with your name and the role "UI/UX Design Intern".

title: Backend Developer Job Simulation
description: Build REST APIs, implement JWT authentication, connect databases, and write unit tests in a guided workspace.
about: Build real backend systems used in production apps. This simulation covers API design, authentication, database operations, and testing.

tasks.title: Design a REST API
tasks.description: Design and document a REST API for a task-management app. Define all endpoints, request bodies, and response schemas using OpenAPI (Swagger).

tasks.title: Build & Implement the API
tasks.description: Implement the API in Node.js + Express. Connect it to MongoDB using Mongoose. Implement CRUD for tasks and users.

tasks.title: JWT Authentication
tasks.description: Add JWT-based authentication. Implement register, login, and a protected route. Hash passwords with bcrypt.

tasks.title: Unit Tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for at least 3 API endpoints using Jest + Supertest. Aim for happy path and at least 1 edge case per endpoint.

faq.a: Node.js, Express, MongoDB. The tasks also mention JWT and Jest which are standard in the ecosystem.

faq.q: What do I get for INR 99?
faq.a: A verified, downloadable PDF certificate with QR code verification.
